name: WINDTREE THERAPEUTICS INC /DE/
business: Windtree Therapeutics is a biotechnology company focused on advancing early and late-stage innovative therapies for critical conditions and diseases. Its lead product candidate, istaroxime, is a first-in-class, dual-mechanism agent being developed for acute heart failure and cardiogenic shock. The company also has preclinical SERCA2a activators for heart failure, rostafuroxin for hypertension, and a preclinical aPKCi inhibitor for oncology.
sellsTo: patients with acute heart failure and cardiogenic shock
patients with oncology indications (cutaneous malignancies and solid tumors)

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company focused on advancing early and late-stage innovative therapies for critical conditions and diseases.

catalysts.event: Unblinded review of data from first 20 subjects in SEISMiC C study
catalysts.sentence: An unblinded review of the data from the first 20 subjects is planned to take place in Q3 2025.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment in SEISMiC C study (SCAI Stage C cardiogenic shock)
catalysts.sentence: Enrollment anticipated to be completed in Q1 2026.

tamClaims.claim: AHF combined annual addressable market (U.S., EU and Japan) of approximately two million patients with multi-billion-dollar annual market value.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that AHF may represent a potential combined annual addressable market (U.S., EU and Japan) of approximately two million patients with multi-billion-dollar annual market value.

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide total market value of cardiogenic shock is $1.25 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: we estimate the worldwide total market value of cardiogenic shock to be $1.25 billion.
